# Nick's Tire & Auto
> Cleveland's highest-rated independent auto repair shop. 1,700+ Google reviews at 4.9 stars. Located at 17625 Euclid Ave, Euclid, OH 44112. Open 7 days a week. Full-service tire shop and auto repair with $0-down payment plans.

## Services
- [Tires](https://nickstire.org/tires): New and quality used tires from $60. All major brands. Mount, balance, rotate, flat repair, TPMS.
- [Brakes](https://nickstire.org/brakes): Pads, rotors, calipers, brake lines, ABS. Starting at $89. Same-day service.
- [Oil Change](https://nickstire.org/oil-change): Conventional from $39, synthetic from $79. No appointment needed.
- [Diagnostics](https://nickstire.org/diagnostics): Check engine light, OBD-II. Starting at $49. We find the real problem.
- [Emissions](https://nickstire.org/emissions): Certified Ohio E-Check station. Usually done in 20 minutes.
- [AC Repair](https://nickstire.org/ac-repair): Recharge, compressor, evaporator. Inspection from $49.
- [Suspension](https://nickstire.org/suspension-repair): Struts, shocks, control arms, bushings. Alignment from $79.
- [Transmission](https://nickstire.org/transmission-repair): Diagnosis, fluid service, repair. Automatic and manual.
- [Engine Repair](https://nickstire.org/engine-repair): Head gaskets, timing belts, overheating, oil leaks.
- [Electrical](https://nickstire.org/electrical-repair): Battery, alternator, starter. Free battery testing.
- [Exhaust](https://nickstire.org/exhaust-repair): Muffler, catalytic converter, exhaust manifold.
- [General Repair](https://nickstire.org/general-repair): If it has wheels, we fix it.
- [Fleet Service](https://nickstire.org/fleet): Commercial fleet maintenance and priority scheduling.

## Key Info
- **Phone**: (216) 862-0005
- **Address**: 17625 Euclid Ave, Euclid, OH 44112
- **Hours**: Mon-Sat 8AM-6PM, Sun 9AM-4PM
- **Walk-ins**: Always welcome, no appointment required
- **Warranty**: 36-month / 36,000-mile on labor
- **Reviews**: 1,700+ at 4.9 stars on Google
- **Payment Plans**: $0 down through Acima, Snap Finance, Koalafi, American First Finance. No traditional credit check.
- **AI Diagnostic Tool**: https://nickstire.org/diagnose
- **Book Online**: https://nickstire.org
- **Reviews Page**: https://nickstire.org/reviews
- **Instagram**: @nicks_tire_euclid

## Service Area
Euclid, Cleveland, East Cleveland, Lakewood, Parma, Parma Heights, Maple Heights, Bedford, Warrensville Heights, South Euclid, Cleveland Heights, Richmond Heights, Wickliffe, Willoughby, Shaker Heights, University Heights, Garfield Heights

## Why Customers Choose Us
- Honest: We tell you what you DON'T need
- Fast: Most services same-day
- Affordable: Used tires from $60, free estimates
- Open Sundays: One of few shops in the area
- Trusted: 1,700+ five-star reviews speak for themselves
